title: Day 10 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition 1
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these three sentences:  

Sentence 1 - ちかく　に　れすとらん　が　あります か。 (chikaku ni restoran ga arimas ka = Are there restaurants nearby?

Sentence 2 - いいえ、ありません。 (iie arimasen) = No, there aren't.

Sentence 2 - はい、あります。 (hai arimas) = Yes, there are.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard.  Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
